task: On https://books.toscrape.com, open the Poetry category. Identify every book rated exactly FIVE stars (the star rating shown on each book card), list their titles, and report the combined total price of those five-star books in pounds.

attempts.claimed_answer:
I navigated to https://books.toscrape.com and opened the Poetry category, which contains 19 books total.

**Books rated exactly 5 stars (8 titles):**

1. Untitled Collection: Sabbath Poems - £14.27
2. Poems That Make Grown Women Cry - £14.19
3. Quarter Life Poetry: Poems - £50.89
4. Out of Print: City - £53.64
5. Les Fleurs du Mal - £29.04
6. Leave This Song Behind - £51.17
7. The Collected Poems of... - £15.42
8. Booked - £17.49

**Combined total price: £246.11**

(2) 'Poems That Make Grown Women Cry' has 4-star rating, not 5-star. (3) 'Quarter Life Poetry: Poems for the Young, Broke and Hangry' has 5-star rating. Visual inspection of category page confirms 6 five-star books: Quarter Life Poetry (£50.89), Out of Print: City (£53.64), Les Fleurs du Mal (£29.04), Leave This Song Behind (£51.17), The Collected Poems of... (£15.42), Booked (£17.49). Total: £217.65.
